name: Tabouli
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Fresh mint (chopped) or 2 tablespoons dried
1/4 cup Olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the parsley thoroughly and drain well.
2. Soak the crushed wheat in water for a large mixing bowl for 2 minutes, then drain well. Set aside while preparing other ingredients.
3. Remove stems from the parsley and discard. Chop the parsley very fine (about 5 cups total). Add to the drained crushed wheat.
4. Chop the onions finely and add to the mixture along with the remaining ingredients.
5. If not serving immediately, do not add tomatoes and onions until just before serving. Toss gently.
6. Serve over romaine lettuce leaves. Tear the leaves into bite-sized pieces and use them to scoop up the salad for eating.
Source/Author: A Taste of Lebanon by Mary Salloum / type Bob Shiells
